manoeuvre.changed: Two to four sentences summarising what changed in the Manoeuvre domain this month across all theatres. This is the free-text paragraph that appears in the collapsible 'What Changed this Month' bar. Write it as a direct brief to the reader — what they need to know, why it matters, what changed from last month.

opportunities.title: Short title for Opportunity 1
opportunities.body: One to three sentences explaining the opportunity. Be specific — name the tactic, technique, or capability and what it enables.

vulnerabilities.title: Short title for Vulnerability 1
vulnerabilities.body: One to three sentences explaining the vulnerability. Name the gap, the threat, and the implication for planning.

capdevs.title: Short title for Capability Development 1
capdevs.body: One to three sentences describing the capability development — what it is, who fielded it, what it does, and why it matters.

sense-strike.changed: What changed in the Sense-Strike domain this month.

combat-support.changed: What changed in the Combat Support domain this month.

expeditionary.changed: What changed in the Expeditionary domain this month.

unmanned.changed: What changed in the Unmanned Systems domain this month.
